recommendations.title: The Secret Life of Walter Mitty
recommendations.overview: A timid magazine photo manager who lives life vicariously through daydreams embarks on a true-life adventure when a negative goes missing.

recommendations.title: Trojan War
recommendations.overview: Brad is about to hook up with the girl of his dreams, but runs into a problem, no condom. So Brad sets out into the night to find one, running into many obstacles along the way, while not knowing his best friend, Leah is in love with him.

recommendations.title: Catfight
recommendations.overview: The rivalry between two former college friends comes to a head when they both attend the same glamorous event.

recommendations.title: The Magician
recommendations.overview: Failed magician Iskender decides to do a tour to save his career, but has to bring his grumpy and senile father along. The tour is quite unexpectedly interrupted when a bride actually disappears from the stage.

recommendations.title: For Richer or Poorer

recommendations.title: Reality Bites

recommendations.title: Kuffs

recommendations.title: 3 Idiots
recommendations.overview: Rascal. Joker. Dreamer. Genius... You've never met a college student quite like "Rancho." From the moment he arrives at India's most prestigious university, Rancho's outlandish schemes turn the campus upside down—along with the lives of his two newfo

recommendations.title: Zoolander 2
recommendations.overview: Derek and Hansel are modelling again when an opposing company attempts to take them out from the business.

recommendations.title: Like Sunday, Like Rain
recommendations.overview: A struggling musician becomes a 12-year-old musical prodigy's guardian for a summer.
